chapter_title.en: Punishment of depriving a believer of his right

text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنِ الْمُفَضَّلِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ حَبَسَ مُؤْمِناً عَنْ مَالِهِ وَ هُوَ مُحْتَاجٌ إِلَیْهِ لَمْ یَذُقْ وَ اللَّهِ مِنْ طَعَامِ الْجَنَّهِ وَ لَا یَشْرَبُ مِنَ الرَّحِیقِ الْمَخْتُومِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 2. And from the previous chain from Muhammad b. Sinan from al-Muffadhal from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who withholds the wealth of a believer which he needed, by Allah, he will never taste the food of Paradise nor will he be able to taste the sealed drink of Paradise.”
